name: immoparticuliers-platform
description: Plateforme de gestion locative entre particuliers

scripts.build: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix server run build && cd server && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
scripts.dev: (cd server && npm run dev) & (cd client && npm run dev)
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx prisma migrate reset --force && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts

author: ImmoParticuliers
